title: 4.  Where do I send information and where should I go for information? - Canada.ca
content:
## 4. Where do I send information and where should I go for information?

## Check processing times
- Processing times for PSR applications

### Check on your application status

### Obtain case status updates on files
- in Canada – Email the Resettlement Operations Centre in Ottawa
- outside Canada – contact the overseas IRCC office responsible for your country (only after estimated processing times have passed)

### Sponsorship withdrawals, addition of dependants and One-Year Window requests
- email the Resettlement Operations Centre in Ottawa

### Provide information on changes in organization or updated contact information for Groups of Five or Community Sponsors
- submit changes to organization’s address by using a case specific enquiry . (Groups of Five and Community sponsors only)

### Update an applicant’s contact information or case information
- contact the overseas IRCC office responsible for your country - Sponsorship group representatives should provide a signed copy of the Use of a Representative form (IMM 5476) ( PDF , 648 KB ) if one was not already included with your application.

### For matters on Sponsorship Agreement Holders sponsorship agreements, annual reports and allocations, or to provide updated contact information
- contact the IRCC National Headquarters

### For information on Visa Office-Referred and Joint Assistance Sponsorship matches
- general information or to indicate interest in a refugee profile, contact the Refugee Sponsorship Training Program
- for additional information on a particular profile, email the Resettlement Operations Centre in Ottawa .
